question: <statistical method>
description: Extract all statistical methods explicitly reported in the Association Test Method column. If multiple methods are reported in one study, split them into separate entries.

question: <variables>
description: Extract all variables explicitly reported in the Independent Variable Unit and Dependent Variable Unit columns.

question: <independent variables>
description: Extract all independent variables explicitly reported in the Independent Variable Unit column.

question: <dependent variables>
description: Extract all dependent variables explicitly reported in the Dependent Variable Unit column.

question: <variables> <scale> <unit>
description: Extract all variables together with their explicitly reported measurement scales and units.

answer.scale: >3−5 red blood cells per high power field
Stunting and Wasting, Normal, Overweight and Obesity

question: <independent variable> <scale> <unit>
description: Extract measurement scales and units for independent variables only.

answer.scale: Stunting and Wasting, Normal, Overweight and Obesity

question: <dependent variable> <scale> <unit>
description: Extract measurement scales and units for dependent variables only.

answer.scale: >3−5 red blood cells per high power field

question: <independent variable> <dependent variable>
description: Extract all explicitly reported independent–dependent variable pairs. Each pair should be listed once per study, regardless of the number of statistical methods used.

question: <independent variable> <dependent variable> <statistical method> <conditions> <effect size>
description: Extract full atomic statistical results. Effect size must be a numeric value only.

question: count - <statistical method>
description: For each study, count the number of statistical methods explicitly reported in the Association Test Method column after splitting by method.

question: count - <variables>
description: For each study, count the number of unique variables appearing in the Independent Variable Unit and Dependent Variable Unit columns (union of both columns).

question: count - <independent variable>
description: For each study, count the number of independent variables explicitly reported in the Independent Variable Unit column.

question: count - <dependent variable>
description: For each study, count the number of dependent variables explicitly reported in the Dependent Variable Unit column.

question: count - <independent variable> <dependent variable>
description: Count the total number of UNIQUE (distinct) independent variable (IV) – dependent variable (DV) pairs across all papers in this collection.

question: list - <independent variable> <dependent variable> <effect size> (<effect size> > 0.7)
description: List all independent–dependent variable pairs whose effect size is strictly greater than 0.7, using the numeric effect_size field.
